name: 12M Payday Loans
description_short: 12M Payday Loans operates physical locations across California offering fast payday loans up to $5,000 and check cashing services for urgent financial needs.
description_long:
12M Payday Loans is a California-based payday lender with 14 physical store locations across the state, including Los Angeles, San Jose, Oakland, Fresno, and the Inland Empire. The company positions itself as a solution for unexpected financial emergencies and cash flow gaps. They explicitly mention serving customers facing financial difficulties who need quick loans or check cashing services.

The company offers payday loans up to $5,000, $1,500 loan products, check cashing services, and unspecified financial products marketed as emergency cash solutions. They advertise fast approval and same-day funding capabilities. Their service model is entirely in-person store-based, with no mention of online applications or remote funding on the provided website content.

Distinguishing features include consistent store hours across all locations (Monday-Friday 10am-6pm, Saturday-Sunday 10am-4pm), direct phone and email contact available by zip code, and emphasis on privacy and security. They encourage customers to call ahead to plan visits and ask about required documentation. The branch manager model suggests personalized service and loan estimate guidance before application.

12M Payday Loans operates in the high-cost emergency lending space typical of payday lenders. While they emphasize speed and convenience through multiple locations, the website provides no pricing information, fee structures, or APR disclosures. This is standard for payday lenders but means customers cannot evaluate true cost before contact. The product is appropriate only for genuine short-term cash emergencies, not ongoing borrowing needs.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 14 physical store locations across California enabling in-person service and same-day transactions
Extended weekend hours (10am-4pm Saturday-Sunday) providing access beyond typical business hours
Loan amounts up to $5,000 allowing larger emergency needs than typical payday loans
Multiple contact methods (phone, email, in-person) by specific location with dedicated email addresses
Encourages upfront documentation questions to reduce customer trips and streamline processing
Check cashing services available in addition to payday loans for flexible cash access
Emphasis on privacy and safety in customer communications
cons: No pricing, fee, or APR information disclosed on website—true cost of loans cannot be evaluated before contact
Entirely store-based with no online application or remote funding option mentioned
Limited operational hours (6pm weekday close, 4pm weekend close) may conflict with working customers
Website does not specify minimum credit score requirements, income verification standards, or approval timeline specifics
No mention of alternative products (lines of credit, installment plans) or exit strategies for ongoing debt
best_for: Customers with same-day or next-day cash needs in California who prefer in-person service and can visit a physical location
Individuals needing check cashing or money order services combined with emergency loan options
People in areas served by their 14 locations who lack access to traditional bank credit or payday alternatives
diagnosis: 12M Payday Loans is best suited for California residents facing immediate, short-term cash emergencies who can access a physical store location and have the ability to repay within the typical payday loan cycle. The primary caveat is the complete absence of fee and APR disclosure on their website, making it impossible to compare true cost before contact; customers must call ahead to understand whether this loan aligns with their actual financial situation.
services: In-person loan consultations with branch managers
Emergency cash solutions for unexpected expenses
Same-day or fast funding (implied but not explicitly stated)
Phone and email customer support by location
Multiple California store locations for customer convenience
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 3728 S La Brea Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90016
